Home/Params

Chain Parameters

Live protocol parameters and settings for Sovereign L1 modules

Unbonding Time

Duration

Time duration after requesting undelegation before funds are released.

21 days (1,814,400s)

Max Validators

Integer

Maximum number of active validators participating in consensus.

30

Min Self Delegation

Coin

Minimum amount of staking tokens a validator must delegate to themselves.

1,000,000 uSLT

Bond Denom

String

The native denomination used for staking and governance voting power.

uSLT

Historical Entries

Integer

Number of historical info entries stored in the state history.

10,000
